name: Brussel Sprouts with Balsamic Vinegar
recipeIngredient: 1 Salt and freshly ground black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim off the stems and remove any limp leaves from the Brussels sprouts.
2. Blanch the sprouts in boiling water to cover for 5 minutes. Drain and rinse under cold water to stop the cooking process.
3. Heat a large frying pan and add the olive oil, garlic, and onion. Saute a few minutes until the onion is just becoming tender.
4. Add the blanched, drained Brussels sprouts. Saute a few more minutes until the Brussels sprouts are cooked to your liking.
5. Add the balsamic vinegar and toss so that all the sprouts are coated with the vinegar.
6. Add the butter, salt, and freshly ground black pepper to taste. Toss together again.
